[Home](./index.md) &gt; [openrct2-flexui](./openrct2-flexui.md) &gt; [Binder](./openrct2-flexui.binder.md) &gt; [twoway](./openrct2-flexui.binder.twoway.md)

## Binder.twoway() method

Reads the specified value and writes it to the target. If the value is a store, a binding will be added. If the value is a two-way bindable, the store will automatically be updated when the out-key callback is called. If the target was nameless, an id will be assigned to it. This method is effectively calling `add()` and `callback()` in that order.

**Signature:**

```typescript
twoway<T extends TTarget, I extends keyof T, V extends T[I]>(target: T, inKey: I, outKey: keyof T, value: TwoWayBindable<V> | undefined, callback: ((arg: V) => void) | undefined): void;
```
